title: cyperus tenax var. andongensis
intro:
Cyperus tenax var. andongensis is a variety of the Cyperus tenax plant, which is a species of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It is native to the Philippines and is also known as Andong sedge. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of Cyperus tenax var. andongensis include treating fever, colds, and respiratory problems, and it can also be used to reduce swelling and alleviate pain. 

In terms of herbal preparations, the roots of the plant can be used to make a decoction, which is a liquid extract made by steeping the plant material in hot water. The decoction can be used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and sore throat.
